untranslatable_reason: Pattern recognition (Double Tops, Adam & Adam) requires visual/structural pattern detection not available in allowed indicators. Entry condition 'Pattern forms in bull/bear market context' and 'Pattern classified as short-term bearish reversal' cannot be expressed with price/technical indicators alone. Exit conditions marked as AUTHOR_SILENT require interpretation. Proxy conditions used for downward breakout and reversal, but true pattern matching is untranslatable.
translation_notes: Translated downward breakout as close < prev_close with volume confirmation. Reversal exit as close > prev_high. Performance metrics (72% success rate bear, 19% average decline, 11% failure rate) noted but not encodable as conditions. Recommend implementing pattern detection module separately or providing specific price level/structure parameters for Double Tops identification.
